Healthcare AI Launchpad

From concept to deployed AI operating model.

A hands-on BrainSAIT course that takes healthcare teams through AI strategy, prompt engineering, governance frameworks, and real delivery execution.

Course Objectives

  • Design and deploy a functional AI operating model.
  • Master prompt engineering strategies tailored for clinical & administrative workflows.
  • Implement security, compliance, and governance frameworks suitable for Saudi Arabia (NPHIES/CBAHI).
  • Measure and iterate on AI performance with healthcare-specific KPIs.

Course Materials & Downloads

Download the required manuals and technical architecture documents for this course below:

BrainSAIT AI Masterclass (PDF) System Architecture Document (PDF) Comprehensive Guide to the 13 LINC Agents (PDF)
